author: mayor
text:
Also fix alerts/claude-usage.yaml — same metric name issue:

- claude_usage_session_utilization → claude_usage_session_utilization_percent (used in ClaudeUsageSessionUtilizationWarning and ClaudeUsageSessionUtilizationCritical)
- claude_usage_weekly_utilization → claude_usage_weekly_utilization_percent (used in ClaudeUsageWeeklyUtilizationWarning and ClaudeUsageWeeklyUtilizationCritical)

claude_usage_poll_errors_total in ClaudeUsagePollErrors is correct — leave it.
